narrative:
Madison County has 26,972 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.2% of registrants.
